texto: Use more caution the next time you make a reading selection. Books, you know, are a lot like people, and each and every one of us is ultimately judged by the company we keep
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ethan Russell Erway: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Use more caution the next time you make a reading selection. Books, you know, are a lot like peop…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, books, reading pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reading.
